query:
-- 1. Add review fields to kb_product_innovations
ALTER TABLE kb_product_innovations
  ADD COLUMN reviewStatus ENUM('draft','pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' AFTER status,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT NULL AFTER reviewStatus,
  ADD COLUMN reviewNote TEXT NULL AFTER reviewedBy,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewNote,
  ADD COLUMN submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewedAt,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private' AFTER submittedAt;

-- 2. Add review fields to kb_listing_copywriting
ALTER TABLE kb_listing_copywriting
  ADD COLUMN reviewStatus ENUM('draft','pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' AFTER status,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT NULL AFTER reviewStatus,
  ADD COLUMN reviewNote TEXT NULL AFTER reviewedBy,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewNote,
  ADD COLUMN submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewedAt,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private' AFTER submittedAt;

-- 3. Add review fields to kb_image_sets
ALTER TABLE kb_image_sets
  ADD COLUMN reviewStatus ENUM('draft','pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' AFTER status,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT NULL AFTER reviewStatus,
  ADD COLUMN reviewNote TEXT NULL AFTER reviewedBy,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewNote,
  ADD COLUMN submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewedAt,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private' AFTER submittedAt;

-- 4. Add review fields to kb_operation_skills (SOP) + access level
ALTER TABLE kb_operation_skills
  ADD COLUMN reviewStatus ENUM('draft','pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' AFTER status,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT NULL AFTER reviewStatus,
  ADD COLUMN reviewNote TEXT NULL AFTER reviewedBy,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewNote,
  ADD COLUMN submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewedAt,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private' AFTER submittedAt,
  ADD COLUMN accessLevel ENUM('public','team','restricted') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'public' AFTER visibility,
  ADD COLUMN allowedRoles TEXT NULL COMMENT 'JSON array of allowed roles' AFTER accessLevel;

-- 5. Add review fields to kb_videos
ALTER TABLE kb_videos
  ADD COLUMN reviewStatus ENUM('draft','pending_review','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' AFTER status,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT NULL AFTER reviewStatus,
  ADD COLUMN reviewNote TEXT NULL AFTER reviewedBy,
  ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewNote,
  ADD COLUMN submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewedAt,
  ADD COLUMN visibility ENUM('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private' AFTER submittedAt;
